summary: Live PR inventory shard classified conservatively using the hydrated preflight artifact. No GitHub mutations are planned: instant close, low-signal close, merge, fix, and raise_pr paths are disabled or blocked for this job. PR #93592 is routed to central security handling because deterministic validation treats it as security-sensitive. No shared canonical is selected because the shard contains independent open PRs across exec defaults, plugin allowlisting, sessions.list performance, browser tab discovery, and isolated cron delivery.

actions.reason: Route the exact security-sensitive PR to central OpenClaw security triage; continue classifying unrelated non-security items separately.
